cases.name: demo_identity_passthrough
cases.notes: A = identity, so output C should equal B exactly.

cases.name: demo_negative_identity
cases.notes: A = -identity, so output C should be element-wise negation of B.

cases.name: demo_zero_matrix
cases.notes: A = all zeros, so output C must be all zeros regardless of B.

cases.name: demo_half_scale
cases.notes: A = 0.5 * identity, so output C should be 0.5 * B.

cases.name: demo_signed_passthrough
cases.notes: A = identity, B has mixed signs; output C should preserve each signed B element.
